profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:04:25 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02574Edwin E. Salpeter papers14-22-2574Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:07:07 UTC.appm >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Edwin E. Salpeter papers
Salpeter, Edwin E.
Salpeter, Jakob.
14-22-2574
16.1 cubic feet. 16.1 cubic feet.
1949-1998. <<<<<<< HEAD 1 2 3 ======= 1 2 3 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2315942
Restrictions on Access
Access to Box 14 restricted until 2029 or by permission of donor.
Scope and content
Correspondence and drafts pertaining to Salpeter and Hans Bethe's work in Handbuch der Physik XXXV; also, correspondence, announcements, reports, reprints, lecture notes, examinations and other material pertaining to Salpeter's involvement with the National Science Foundation and the National Science Board, especially concerning national science policy. Also, includes autobiography of Edwin's father, Jakob Salpeter and minutes of the Arecibo Technical Committee meetings.
Preferred Citation
Edwin E. Salpeter Papers, #14-22-2574. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Physicist and astrophysicist, Cornell University.
Science and state. Physics -- Study and teaching. Astrophysics -- Study and teaching. Physicists. Astrophysicists. Bethe, Hans Albrecht, 1906- National Science Foundation Cornell University -- : Faculty. National Science Board Arecibo Ionospheric Observatory
